body.title: Fix: test_dicksimnel_channel mock return values broken by close-failure guard
body.done_note: Shipped in e543554d; tests now pass with correct mock return values
body.description:
After T-dicksimnel-close-failure-handling shipped the close-failure guard, test_dicksimnel_channel.py tests that mocked _run_queue_cmd with return_value=None started failing — the guard treats None as a close failure and escalates instead of posting DONE. Fixed by updating mock return values to {"status": "closed"}.

**Affected files:** tests/inference/test_dicksimnel_channel.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** test mock fix only
**Completion criteria:** test_post_result_posts_done and test_post_result_channel_failure_still_increments_counter pass
